tasks.label: Validate: PowerShell Syntax
args: Set-StrictMode -Version Latest; $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $root = $env:WINDOWS_MASTER_ROOT; $excluded = '\\(?:\.git|\.venv|venv|__pycache__|Sandbox)(?:\\|$)'; $failed = $false; $files = @(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $root -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.ps1', '.psm1', '.psd1' -and $_.FullName -notmatch $excluded }); foreach ($file in $files) { $tokens = $null; $errors = $null; [void][System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile($file.FullName, [ref]$tokens, [ref]$errors); foreach ($parseError in $errors) { [Console]::Error.WriteLine(('{0}:{1}:{2}: {3}' -f $file.FullName, $parseError.Extent.StartLineNumber, $parseError.Extent.StartColumnNumber, $parseError.Message)); $failed = $true } }; if ($failed) { exit 1 }; Write-Host ('Validated {0} PowerShell file(s).' -f $files.Count)

tasks.label: Lint: PowerShell (PSScriptAnalyzer)
args: Set-StrictMode -Version Latest; $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; if (-not (Get-Module -ListAvailable -Name PSScriptAnalyzer)) { throw 'PSScriptAnalyzer is required. Install it through the repository-approved dependency process.' }; Import-Module PSScriptAnalyzer -ErrorAction Stop; $root = $env:WINDOWS_MASTER_ROOT; $excluded = '\\(?:\.git|\.venv|venv|__pycache__|Sandbox)(?:\\|$)'; $files = @(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $root -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.ps1', '.psm1', '.psd1' -and $_.FullName -notmatch $excluded }); $findings = @($files | ForEach-Object { Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path $_.FullName -Severity Warning, Error }); foreach ($finding in $findings) { [Console]::Error.WriteLine(('{0}:{1}:{2}: {3} [{4}]' -f $finding.ScriptPath, $finding.Line, $finding.Column, $finding.Message, $finding.RuleName)) }; if ($findings.Count -gt 0) { exit 1 }; Write-Host ('Analyzed {0} PowerShell file(s).' -f $files.Count)
